originalTitle: Secret Tree Hollow | Minecraft Forever World | Ep. 4
content: Welcome to a brand new Minecraft Single player Let's Play World currently in Minecraft Version Update 26.1. This is a forever world which means I will keep this world updated with each new Minecraft update throughout the years and one day hopefully share it with my daughter. 💕 Today I'm creating a cosy tree hollow secret tunnel burrow filled with bunny rabbits. If you watched this entire video you essentially watched me dig dirt for 18 minutes and that's really kind of you, thank you. Please boop the like button if you enjoy the video! :) FOLLOW ME HERE: Twitter: https://twitter.com/LDShadowLady Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/ldshadowlady Twitch: http://www.twitch.tv/ldshadowlady Check out Joel's gaming channel: http://www.youtube.com/SmallishBeans
chineseContent: 欢迎来到目前在 Minecraft 版本更新 26.1 中的全新 Minecraft 单人游戏 Let's Play World。这是一个永恒的世界，这意味着多年来我将通过每次新的 Minecraft 更新来保持这个世界的更新，并希望有一天能与我的女儿分享。 💕 今天我正在创建一个舒适的树空秘密隧道洞穴，里面装满了小兔子。如果您观看了整个视频，您基本上就是在看我挖土 18 分钟，您真是太好了，谢谢。如果您喜欢该视频，请点赞按钮！ :) 在这里关注我： Twitter：https://twitter.com/LDShadowLady Instagram：http://www.instagram.com/ldshadowlady Twitch：http://www.twitch.tv/ldshadowlady 查看 Joel 的游戏频道：http://www.youtube.com/SmallishBeans
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
